title: Serverless GPU compute is in Beta
body:
Serverless GPU compute is now part of the [Serverless compute offering](/aws/en/compute/serverless). Serverless GPU compute is specialized for custom single and multi-node deep learning workloads. You can use serverless GPU compute to train and fine-tune custom models using your favorite frameworks and get state-of-the-art efficiency, performance, and quality.

See [AI Runtime](/aws/en/machine-learning/ai-runtime).
